/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-deprecated -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/generator.dir/generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/generator.dir/utils/Figure.cpp.o -o generator -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL -framework GLUT -framework Cocoa /opt/homebrew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib -framework OpenGL
